summary: Upgraded audience recording delivers an outstanding first set and a strong second set highlighted by GDTRFB, The Wheel and a Jerry ballad.
review: The new high‑quality AUD source showcases an excellent first set and a long, well‑played second set, featuring rare 80s post‑drums moments like Going Down the Road Feeling Bad, The Wheel and a heartfelt Jerry Garcia ballad. Reviewers note that while no soundboard exists, the upgraded audience tape is a significant improvement over previous releases, making the show a credible top‑10 candidate for the year.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (outstanding first set and solid second set) combined with an upgraded audience recording that improves clarity, though only a single review limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Previously circulated as a good‑quality AUD; the recent upgrade provides clearer, more detailed sound, though it remains an audience source rather than a soundboard.

standout_songs: Going Down the Road Feeling Bad
show_quality.setlist_flow: Outstanding first set followed by a long, well‑played second set with classic late‑’80s material; rare combination of GDTRFB, The Wheel and a Jerry ballad in one show.
